summary: Holds SOP geometry and a material for 3D rendering. Place SOPs inside it, assign a MAT, and reference it from a Render TOP to display 3D objects.

key_params.name: material
key_params.note: Path to the MAT operator for surface material

key_params.name: instanceop
key_params.note: Path to CHOP/DAT for GPU instancing data

common_gotchas: Geometry COMP must contain at least one SOP (ending in a Null SOP) and have a material assigned to render.
For instancing, the instance CHOP/DAT must have channels named tx, ty, tz (and optionally rx, ry, rz, sx, sy, sz).
